prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Of course! Here’s your pep talk:  

**You’ve got this.** That task isn’t as scary as your brain is making it out to be. The hardest part is starting—so take one small step right now. Momentum will carry you forward.  

Remember: **Done is better than perfect.** Progress, not perfection, is the goal. Every minute you spend working on it is a minute closer to relief and pride.  

You’re capable. You’re resilient. And future-you will be *so* grateful you tackled this now.  

Now take a deep breath, set a timer for 10 minutes, and dive in. I believe in you—go prove yourself right! 💪🔥  

(And when you finish, celebrate—even if it’s just with a fist pump or a favorite snack. You *earned* it.)
